title: Positive flow: Fill out the form and submit
test_data: Sam Brown | appcrawler5@gmail.com | 4155791543 | Please, write a message to the user
test_steps: Navigate to the contact form screen. | Click on the 'Nombre' field and enter 'John Doe'. | Click on the 'Email' field and enter 'johndoe@example.com'. | Click on the 'Teléfono' field and enter '1234567890'. | Click on the 'Mensaje' field and enter 'I would like to know more about this product.'. | Toggle the 'Envía' switch to 'Enviar'. | Click the 'Enviar' button to submit the form.
expected_result: The form is submitted successfully, and a confirmation message is displayed.

title: Negative flow: Empty form submission
test_steps: Navigate to the contact form screen. | Toggle the 'Envía' switch to 'Enviar'. | Click the 'Enviar' button to submit the form.
expected_result: The form is not submitted, and an error message is displayed.
